name: Arena Group Holdings, Inc.
summary: Arena Group Holdings, Inc. is a brand, data, and IP company that builds, acquires, and scales high-performing digital media assets. It operates owned-and-operated brands including TheStreet, Parade, Men's Journal, Athlon Sports, and the Adventure Network, organized into Sports & Leisure, Finance, Lifestyle, and Platform verticals. The company uses a proprietary publishing platform and entrepreneurial model where Expert Contributors earn revenue shares, while Publisher Partners leverage Arena's technology for content management, SEO, analytics, and monetization.

products.name: Arena Platform
products.description: Proprietary online publishing platform providing content management, SEO, analytics, and monetization tools for owned brands and Publisher Partners.

products.name: Monetization Solutions
products.description: Proprietary advertising technology and tools enabling display/video ad monetization, subscriptions, and membership-based revenue for publishers.

products.name: TheStreet
products.description: Finance vertical anchor brand delivering business news, market data, analysis, and investigative journalism.

products.name: Parade
products.description: Lifestyle vertical anchor brand providing entertainment and lifestyle content to broad consumer audiences.

products.name: Athlon Sports
products.description: Sports & Leisure vertical anchor brand covering sports and fan interests.

products.name: Men's Journal
products.description: Sports & Leisure enthusiast brand covering men's lifestyle and fitness content.

products.name: Adventure Network
products.description: Sports & Leisure enthusiast brand comprising Surfer, Powder, Bike, TransWorld SKATEboarding, and Snowboarder.

products.name: ShopHQ
products.description: Digital-first, dropship-focused commerce brand acquired in 2025, integrating live selling and social commerce with media audience.

products.name: Autoblog
products.description: Finance vertical enthusiast brand acquired in 2025 providing automotive coverage and consumer tools.

products.name: Lindy's Sports
products.description: Sports & Leisure anchor brand acquired in 2025.

partnerships.description: Independent third-party websites licensing Arena's platform, technology, and monetization tools to produce and publish content on their own domains.
